core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Cyber-punk meets Enterprise Data
Emotion First: The UI must feel 'Alive' and 'Watchful'
Content is King: Data is the hero, UI is the HUD
Negative Space: Use black void as a canvas
Contrast: High-visibility neon against deep matte black

backgroundImage.grid-pattern: linear-gradient(to right, #18181b 1px, transparent 1px), linear-gradient(to bottom, #18181b 1px, transparent 1px)

layout_strategies.bento_grid_classes: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]

customizations.style: bg-cyber-gray/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:border-cyber-cyan/50 transition-colors duration-300
rounded-none px-2 py-0.5 font-mono text-xs uppercase border border-current bg-transparent

hero_background.usage: Landing page hero background with overlay

feature_server.description: Modern server room with blue light

accessibility.contrast_check: Ensure neon text has sufficient contrast against black backgrounds. Use shading or outlines if needed.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query for scanlines and glitch effects.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add JetBrains Mono and Manrope to public/index.html or import in CSS.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'colors' and 'backgroundImage' provided in this JSON.
3. GLOBAL CSS: Add the 'scanline' animation class to index.css if not using Tailwind utilities directly.
4. COMPONENTS: When building the dashboard, use the 'High Density' grid strategy. Do not leave gaps.
5. MARKER: Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
6. CHARTS: Use Recharts with the custom neon palette (Cyan, Purple, Green, Red).
7. MAPS: Use a dark-themed map (e.g., react-simple-maps with custom fill) for the IP geolocation features.
8. THEME: Default to DARK mode. Do not create a light mode unless explicitly asked (Cybersecurity apps are dark by default).
9. ICONS: Use Lucide React icons. Stroke width 1.5px for a clean technical look.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: Do not use gradients for main backgrounds; use them for borders or accents only.
Avoid 'Inter' for headings. Use JetBrains Mono.
Use 2-3x more padding than usual for Marketing pages.
Micro-interactions: Buttons should glow or glitch on hover.
Never use pure black (#000000) for large surfaces; use #0A0A0B.
Every page must tell a story. The Dashboard is the 'Command Center'.
